implementationTasks.title: Refresh meta descriptions
implementationTasks.description: Ensure all key pages have unique, compelling meta descriptions under 160 chars

implementationTasks.title: Normalize homepage max-width containers
implementationTasks.description: Ensure all major homepage sections share a consistent max-width container (e.g., max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4) for better readability on large screens
implementationTasks.impact: Cleaner visual hierarchy and easier scanning

implementationTasks.title: Focus hero CTAs
implementationTasks.description: Reduce competing primary CTAs in the hero section and emphasize one or two main actions (Start a Project, View Pricing) with secondary links grouped beneath
implementationTasks.impact: Clearer decision path for new visitors

implementationTasks.title: Clarify primary CTAs
implementationTasks.description: Make primary call-to-action buttons more prominent and action-oriented

implementationTasks.title: Update stale content
implementationTasks.description: Review blog and case studies for outdated stats or references

implementationTasks.title: Optimize images
implementationTasks.description: Use next/image, WebP, and lazy loading for all images

implementationTasks.title: Improve form labels
implementationTasks.description: Ensure all form inputs have visible labels and aria attributes

evolutionRoadmap: Make the homepage layout easier to scan on desktop and mobile with consistent section spacing and clearer visual breaks
Refine hero and quick-jump sections so executives can quickly understand what Zion does, key outcomes, and the next best step
